name: ediscovery
description: an e-discovery review world labeling docs responsive/privileged; actions ingest, review, produce, withhold

card.description: an e-discovery review world labeling docs responsive/privileged; actions ingest, review, produce, withhold

rules: 'ingest' moves one raw document from the inbox into the corpus as 'unreviewed'.
'review' labels an unreviewed document with responsive and privileged flags, making it 'reviewed'.
'produce' is legal only for a reviewed document that is responsive and not privileged.
'withhold' is legal for a reviewed document that is privileged or not responsive; it joins the privilege log.
A privileged document is never produced (no inadvertent disclosure).
Each document advances monotonically: unreviewed -> reviewed -> produced|withheld.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    docs = {k: dict(v) for k, v in s.get("docs", {}).items()}
    log = list(s.get("log", []))
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    def ordered():
        return sorted(docs, key=lambda x: int(x))

    def first_status(status):
        for did in ordered():
            if docs[did]["status"] == status:
                return did
        return None

    def first_reviewed(pred):
        for did in ordered():
            d = docs[did]
            if d["status"] == "reviewed" and pred(d):
                return did
        return None

    if name == "ingest":
        # Pull one raw document off the inbox into the review corpus.
        if s.get("inbox", 0) > 0:
            did = str(s.get("next_id", 1))
            docs[did] = {"status": "unreviewed", "responsive": None,
                         "privileged": None}
            s["next_id"] = s.get("next_id", 1) + 1
            s["inbox"] = s["inbox"] - 1
            s["ingested"] = s.get("ingested", 0) + 1
            log.append("ingest:" + did)

    elif name == "review":
        # Label an unreviewed document responsive / privileged. When the labels
        # are not supplied they are derived deterministically from the doc id so
        # rollouts are replayable.
        did = params.get("doc") or first_status("unreviewed")
        if did is not None and did in docs and docs[did]["status"] == "unreviewed":
            i = int(did)
            responsive = params.get("responsive")
            if responsive is None:
                responsive = (i % 2 == 1)
            privileged = params.get("privileged")
            if privileged is None:
                privileged = (i % 3 == 0)
            docs[did]["status"] = "reviewed"
            docs[did]["responsive"] = bool(responsive)
            docs[did]["privileged"] = bool(privileged)
            s["reviewed"] = s.get("reviewed", 0) + 1
            log.append("review:" + did)

    elif name == "produce":
        # Turn a reviewed document over to the requesting party. Only a
        # responsive, non-privileged document may be produced.
        eligible = lambda d: d["responsive"] and not d["privileged"]
        did = params.get("doc")
        if did is None:
            did = first_reviewed(eligible)
        if (did is not None and did in docs
                and docs[did]["status"] == "reviewed"
                and eligible(docs[did])):
            docs[did]["status"] = "produced"
            s["produced"] = s.get("produced", 0) + 1
            log.append("produce:" + did)

    elif name == "withhold":
        # Hold a reviewed document back onto the privilege log. Legal for a
        # privileged document or one that is simply not responsive.
        eligible = lambda d: d["privileged"] or not d["responsive"]
        did = params.get("doc")
        if did is None:
            did = first_reviewed(eligible)
        if (did is not None and did in docs
                and docs[did]["status"] == "reviewed"
                and eligible(docs[did])):
            docs[did]["status"] = "withheld"
            s["withheld"] = s.get("withheld", 0) + 1
            log.append("withhold:" + did)

    s["docs"] = docs
    s["log"] = log
    return s

emit.report: E-discovery review summary: {ingested} ingested, {reviewed} reviewed, {produced} produced, {withheld} withheld on the privilege log.

objectives.name: review_completeness
objectives.goal: maximize the fraction of ingested documents that are reviewed
